resources.string: The module\'s activation status directly affects its functionality. If the module isn\'t activated, it won\'t work.
Block Google Play Store from updating itself.
The module is enabled and ready.
Enable the module in Xposed or LSPosed first.
Optional launcher visibility and the LSPosed note.
Turn this off to hide the desktop entry. You can still open the module from Xposed or LSPosed settings.
Disable `Force apps to show launcher icons` in LSPosed settings, or the launcher icon may still be forced to stay visible.
Expand for the shortest setup and verification steps.
Enable the module in Xposed or LSPosed first.
Keep the scope limited to Google Play Store only.
Force stop and reopen Play Store after changes.
Older Play Store versions should show 999.999.999 directly.
On Play Store v47+, tap \"Update Play Store\". If it says the store is already up to date, the spoof is active.
